items.claim: Max Holloway has a significant advantage due to his consistent activity in the cage compared to Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max Holloway actually still been out here active fighting, you know? So, I would have to give him the edge a little bit

items.claim: Conor McGregor's long layoff from competition will negatively impact his performance.
items.quote: I think Conor's just been away for too long

items.claim: Conor McGregor is no longer the same fighter he was in his prime.
items.quote: I don't think he's the same McGregor that was

items.claim: Conor McGregor's shift to a boxing-heavy style creates openings that favor Max Holloway's game.
items.quote: since he's went so boxing heavy, I think that there's going to be some things that play really well into Max's game.

items.claim: Max Holloway may struggle to adjust to the physical size of Conor McGregor at the welterweight limit.
items.quote: having to adjust to that new weight class might play a factor.
